title: diplazium altum
intro: Diplazium altum, also known as the tall maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Diplazium altum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
